issue_title: `einsum` is about 40x slower on CUDA than manually multiplying and summing
surface_reasoning: Priority 2: labeled `module: performance` + `module: linear algebra`. Title: 'einsum is about 40x slower on CUDA than manually multiplying and summing' — concrete 40x regression on a CUDA compute op. Domain relevance: CUDA einsum should dispatch to optimized cuBLAS matmul/bmm paths; 40x slowdown versus manual computation indicates broken or missing CUDA kernel dispatch in the einsum optimizer.
